transcript.text:
(Soy sauce marinated shrimps,)
(the best side dish with rice, and...)
(Chapagetti with eggs and cheese?)
Pairing Chapagetti, eggs, cheese, and soy sauce marinated shrimp
(Never been seen before)
(The combination that will blow your mind) How would it taste?
(Success) This is so good!
(Endless soy sauce marinated shrimp)
(How many has she had?)
(Eating soy sauce marinated shrimp until she is done) *** shrimps
Hello everyone
I'm in Nonhyeon-dong right now
I'm here to eat...
Soy sauce marinated shrimp
(Soy sauce marinated shrimp, Chappagetti, eggs, and cheese?) This place is known for shrimp and Chapagetti, eggs, and cheese
(Soy sauce marinated shrimp, Chappagetti, eggs, and cheese?) I've been wanting to try it for a while

Because I love marinated shrimp
('Pro Soy Sauce Marinated Shrimp' Youngdong Market in Nonhyeon-dong) I'm here... Ta-da!
('Pro Soy Sauce Marinated Shrimp' Youngdong Market in Nonhyeon-dong) It looks quite antique
Let's get in
There are so many menus
Oh my
I thought they only had marinated shrimp
(Full of menus) There's so much to choose from
(Decisions... Decisions...) I think I won't be able to enjoy the shrimp if I order too much...
So I'll just get Chapagetti with eggs and cheese,
and marinated shrimps
(Reconsidering again)
Should I get seafood ramyun?
(Reached the final decision) Excuse me
How many shrimps are there on one plate?
(12 shrimps per plate) 12? Then...

Could I get 5 plates of marinated shrimp,
two Chapagetti with eggs and cheese, and a bowl of seafood ramyun, please?
Sure!
(5 plates of soy sauce marinated shrimp)
(The side dishes are ready too!)
(Here comes the shrimps) Thank you
Thank you
Thank you
- Wow! Thank you! - Enjoy
Thanks
(The food is ready) It looks so good!
They have a special way of making Chapagetti noodles
It's very famous around these parts
Pairing Chapagetti, eggs, cheese, and soy sauce marinated shrimp
(It looks amazing...!) This is Chapagetti with eggs and cheese
(It looks amazing...!) And some chili powder inside

It looks so good!
It's very good....!
The sauce
of Chapagetti nooodles
shouldn't be too saucy
or too runny
Right now
It's perfectly saucy...
And so cheesy with the cheese
and with the runny egg yolk...
(The egg and cheese combo is so creamy)
First, a spoonful of the ramyun soup
People don't really eat marinated shrimp with ramyun
Also, you normally get a bowl of rice
with one plate of marinated shrimp
(Normally, it's one bowl of rice per plate) But I asked for one bowl for now

Soy sauce marinated shrimp
Let's try it
I'm so good at peeling shrimps
(Learned this by peeling 100 shrimps at Namdanghang Port)
It's so difficult to peel raw shrimps though
I think I've peeled enough
It looks so good!
First bite!
It's not that salty as it is!
It's not too salty
and
(Could eat this forever!) I don't think it will be too much
and it's easy to peel!
Definitely better than I thought
Let's peel a few more
(They cut the shrimps into bite sizes)

(Peeled the whole plate as I was peeling it)
(Peeling: done) I think I'm good for now
Soy sauce marinated shrimp!
The shrimps are so chewy
and the sauce isn't too salty
The umami flavor is so good
I wonder how it would pair with Chapagetti with eggs and cheese
It's good!
Delicious!
(The shrimps add lots of texture) I love the texture of the shrimps!
So good!
You have to eat this before the noodles get soggy
(The seafood ramen looks amazing) Looks so good!
Eat the noodles first
I should keep this for the soup
(From the looks, it doesn't look like a side dish) There are big scallops in it

I think this place will be so good
(Give me some booze) with some alcoholic drinks!
I can't believe that
there are huge scallops
Shrimps as well
(How does this only cost 5,000 won?) It's such a good and affordable dish in the time of inflation
(How does this only cost 5,000 won?) There are squids too!
(Keeping the ramen for the soup) It's kinda like seafood stew!
Wow, the marinated shrimps
They are so good
Very chewy
I also love
the heads of the shrimps
The heads are
so good with rice
The inside is amazing

They even have
eggs in the marinated shrimps
I have to eat this with the rice
(Adding them) Pour it on top
People would add the sauce and a few shrimps
(Too many shrimps) But, since I have a lot
(Adding as many shrimps as I want)
(Adding the whole plate...!)
(This is half rice and half marinated shrimps) I'm so excited!
(This is half rice and half marinated shrimps) Adding four spoons of the sauce
(The egg yolk will be the cherry on top of this bibimbap) The egg yolk!
(The egg yolk will be the cherry on top of this bibimbap) Look at the color!
I think this will be so good
Since the sauce isn't too salty
(It almost looks like soy sauce marinated crab bibimbap) This looks like soy sauce marinated crabs bibimbap
So good!

I think I should
(Making shrimps head bibimbap!) add the heads of shrimps too!
Is this the right way?
Let's try it first
(Squeeze)
(The soy sauce marinated shrimp bibimbap with much richer flavor)
This is amazing
This time,
I'm going to eat the shrimp...
(Attacking the tail) From the tail!
(You can't miss the tail)
Anyway...
I thought
Because it was cut in thirds
like this
It would be

more difficult to peel
But I think they did it to make it easier to peel
It's easier to peel
without the white parts
Yummy
I remember the time I had 100 shrimps at Namdanghang Port
I'll cut the heads to stop them from moving
(Had to cut all the heads since they were still alive)
(Now I can eat the heads too...)
I couldn't eat the heads back then
I'm so happy I get to eat the heads too
(Eating with so much happiness)
Oh right, the Chapagetti with eggs and cheese
This is so good
Should I eat the tails first again?
This is...

Kinda chewy inside...
Almost stringy?
Woah
(Attacked by the soup)
There's some
crab meat left in the... Oh...!
Shrimp meat left in the head
So that
and the heads like this
(Nothing to waste from the head)
And with the eggs!
(Tzuyang wants to drink again...) This will be so good with some alcochol
(Peeling again)
(Eating a week's worth of shrimps for one meal)
This will be so good!
Two in one bite!

(The texture is so good) The texture is amazing!
You won't get sick of this
(Eating the shrimps by the parts) Am I supposed to eat marinated shrimps like this?
(All that matters is that she's enjoying the meal) It's just good! Shrimp itself is just good!
The heads are so good here
None of them were bitter
So I had 5 plates of 12 shrimps...
(Brain working at its full capacity)
72!
(Was he drinking without me?) No... That doesn't sound right...
50(?)
(She just had a lot) 60 shrimps...
(Moved to another table)
First, I have to...
(Work now) Peel more shrimps!
(You really have to earn every single shrimps you eat)

The last one...
And done!
Should I eat this with rice?
Next up,
Chapagetti with eggs and cheese
(The adrenaline rush... Amazing) I just had the cheesy bite!
(The adrenaline rush... Amazing) This is so... So good
Wrapping it
with shrimps
(Why is this combo so good?) What is this...
(Why is this combo so good?) It's not the best...
(Why is this combo so good?) But it's not bad!
This Chapagetti with eggs and cheese is truly amazing
You should really get this if you come here
(The shrimps are so good by themselves)
(Making fuss after eating everything herself) It's gone... All gone...

Wow
Thank you very much!
(Got a pineapple sherbet on the house for eating a lot!) Is this on the house?
(Got a pineapple sherbet on the house for eating a lot!) Free of charge?
(Got a pineapple sherbet on the house for eating a lot!) Thanks a lot
(She's excited to see something that pairs well with drinks) I used to get this every time I drank
(So refreshing just by looking at it) This looks amazing
(Refreshing)
They're so good together
(The sweet sherbet washes the saltiness of the shrimps) Kind of like, when the saltiness is too much,
(The sweet sherbet washes the saltiness of the shrimps) this will refresh the mouth
Delicious!
(Finished the tails with the sweet and savory combo)
(This combo is quite nice...) I'll put this here
(The last plate...)
It's 6:30!

I was told that the restaurant starts to get packed with people who drink from 7
(Let's finish this quickly) Let's leave in 20 minutes
Would anyone eat like this except me?
(The nostrils approve)
(Satisfied) So good!
(Slightly creepy to see so many heads of shrimps) I've only got heads now
(Clean) All done!
(One last bite of the sherbet)
I'm so happy
First, the shrimps
were great and perfectly seasoned
(Unexpectedly discovered an amazing combo) The marinated shrimps and Chapagetti with eggs and cheese combo felt a little weird at first,
(Unexpectedly discovered an amazing combo) but I ended up really liking it
(Very happy) I loved it here
Thanks for the food!
